content.speakerText: Hi there! Can you help me with borrowing books?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！你能帮我一下借书的事吗？

options.text: Sure! I'd love to help. What do you need to know?
I don't know. Ask someone else.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌且积极的回应，符合服务场景的沟通礼仪。干扰项中，'I don't know...' 显得不友好，'Books are over there.' 没有回应帮助请求，'You have to pay first.' 与借书流程无关且提前引入付费概念，不符合初始咨询语境。

content.speakerText: I'm new here. How many books can I borrow?
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新手，我能借几本书？

options.text: You can borrow up to 5 books at a time. You can renew them later.
You can't borrow any until you register.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅提供了数量（5本），还补充了可续借信息，使回答更实用完整。选项2缺少续借信息，不够全面；选项3和4与常见图书馆政策不符，且未直接回答问题，属于误导性回应。

content.speakerText: Excuse me, I'd like to know how to register for a library card.
content.speakerTextCn: 不好意思，我想知道怎么注册借书证。

options.text: Just go to the front desk and show your ID.
You need to buy a card first.
I'm not sure. Try the website.
You can't get one unless you live here.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接、清晰地给出了操作步骤，符合服务人员的职责。选项2错误地暗示需付费办卡（图书馆卡通常免费）；选项3推卸责任，不专业；选项4带有地域歧视，不符合公共服务原则。

content.template: Hi! Can you help me with ___ books?
content.hint: 这是询问借书流程的关键词

content.template: You can borrow up to ___ books at a time.
content.hint: 这是大多数图书馆的标准借阅数量
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心数字表达：借阅上限

content.template: Could you please tell me how to ___ a library card?
content.hint: 办理借书证的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：apply for a library card（申请借书证）

content.speakerText: Hi there! Can you help me with borrowing books?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！你能帮我一下借书的事吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! How can I assist you?
Sure! I'd be happy to help. What would you like to know?
Absolutely! I'll be glad to guide you through the process.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表示愿意提供帮助，而非拒绝或回避
语言准确性：使用正确的礼貌用语和语法结构（如 I'd be happy to）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合服务场景的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 assist/help/guide 等服务类关键词

content.speakerText: I'm new here. How many books can I borrow?
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新手，我能借几本书？
expectedAnswers: You can borrow up to five books at once. You can also renew them if you need more time.
The limit is five books per person, but renewal is allowed once per item.
Five books total — and don’t worry, you can extend the due date online.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回答数量并补充续借信息
语言准确性：使用 up to, renew, extend 等正确术语
表达自然度：口语化但专业，避免生硬或命令式语气
关键词覆盖：包含 borrow, limit, renew, book 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: I'd like to know if I can borrow e-books too.
content.speakerTextCn: 我想知道我能不能借电子书。
expectedAnswers: Yes, absolutely! We offer e-books through our library app. Just download it and log in with your card.
Of course! You can borrow digital titles using the same account as physical books.
Yes, e-books are available. You'll need to sign up for our digital service first, but it's free.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认电子书可用性并提供基本操作指引
语言准确性：使用 e-books, digital titles, download, log in 等准确术语
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合真实服务对话节奏
关键词覆盖：包含 e-book, borrow, app, digital, log in 等关键词
